response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and systems engineering expertise with exposure to event-driven architectures and AI-agent infrastructure, but lacks direct executive leadership experience in fintech or regulated environments. His background in agentic frameworks (e.g., MCP) and distributed systems is relevant, though his current role does not emphasize the scale or regulatory complexity required for this CTO position.
strengths: Hands-on experience with agentic AI infrastructure (e.g., MCP code generators, frameworks) and event-driven architectures.
Diverse technical background spanning distributed systems, real-time data processing, and multi-language toolchains (TypeScript, Dlang, etc.).
Proven track record of building and maintaining complex systems (e.g., GISCollective, high-throughput microservices at Sociomantic).
concerns: No explicit executive leadership experience (e.g., scaling teams from 10 to 30+, developing technical leadership layers).
Limited fintech-specific expertise (e.g., credit systems, regulatory compliance, or high-stakes financial infrastructure).
Agentic AI experience appears more prototypical (e.g., GISCollective, MCP) than production-grade for regulated environments.
